conversation.content: Hey! I just heard that there's a hockey game in sunny Miami! Can you believe ice and palm trees together? Have you ever seen something like that?

Oh, um, yes! Ice and palm trees, very strange. I never see this before. I think, um, hockey is cold sport, yes? But Miami, very hot, very sunny! 

I, um, don’t know much about hockey. I like, uh, soccer more. Do you like hockey?
Yeah, it is strange! Hockey is usually in cold places. What do you think makes hockey fun?

Um, I think, um, hockey is fun because, uh, players go fast, yes? And they, um, skate a lot. I like the, um, the excitement, um, when they score goal. And, uh, the crowd, they cheer! It is, um, very loud and happy. But I, um, not see hockey live. Only, um, on TV. I think, it look very cool!
That sounds exciting! I can imagine the energy when the crowd cheers. What do you think would be different about watching a hockey game live compared to on TV?

Um, I think, um, watching live is very, um, different. Because, uh, you feel the, um, energy, yes? The people, they are very loud and happy. On TV, it is, uh, quiet, yes? 

And, um, you can see all the, um, action very close. I think, um, when players score, it is, um, exciting. I can feel the, um, joy in the crowd. 

But, um, on TV, you can... um, see the replay, yes? So, maybe, it is good too. I don’t know, um, both are good, I think.
Absolutely! The energy is amazing when you watch live. What do you think is the best part of a hockey game?

Um, I think, um, the best part is, uh, when players, um, score a goal. Yes! When, um, puck goes in the net, um, everybody cheer and, uh, it is very exciting! I like, um, the sound too, it is very loud, um, yes? And, um, sometimes players fight, too, so, um, that is, uh, interesting. But, um, I don't like, um, when they get hurt, no.
That's a great moment! The crowd cheers so loud. How does it feel when your team scores? Do you jump or shout?
Um, yes! I, um, feel very happy. I, uh, want to jump and shout. It's, um, exciting! I, um, feel like I, uh, part of the team, yes? And, um, my friends, they also cheer. It’s, um, very fun!
That sounds like so much fun! I can imagine the happiness when you jump and shout with your friends. What’s one of your favorite memories from a game like that?
